sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3575" key="a)kro/linos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρό-λῐνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3575.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at the edge of the net</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:383" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.383</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
